title: The Glass Key
writer: Dashiell Hammett, Kathryn Scola, Kubec Glasmon
actors: George Raft, Claire Dodd, Edward Arnold
plot: Ed Beaumont is the personal friend, advisor and bodyguard to Paul Madvig, the political boss of a large city. When a mysterious murder is committed---the son of a Madvig political opponent---Madvig's enemies try to pin the crime o...
